_comment: P2b live cross-model round. Author each golden unitary INDEPENDENTLY from its standard definition (big-endian, U[out,in], up to global phase). x_gate = sanity/calibration control (known). sx = NEW intent (no answer key).

intents.definition: Pauli-X (NOT) gate. Swaps |0> and |1>. Standard 2x2 matrix [[0,1],[1,0]].
SX = square-root of Pauli-X (principal square root), the native sqrt-NOT gate. It is the unique (up to global phase) unitary with SX @ SX = X. Author its standard principal form.
